name: That weird pumpkin in Crestfall Town
description:
You are walking through the pumpkin patch in Crestfall town, expecting calm rows of orange gourds. Instead, one lopsided, crooked-stemmed pumpkin caught your attention, launched into a dramatic, hilarious monologue, mocking its neighbors, complaining about the weather, and insisting it was destined for fame.

"Greetings, mortals! I am Sir Gourdington III. Yes, the Third. Some call me Drama Gourd, others call me Star Material. I was born for greatness, not pie. I am lopsided, I am lively, I am unforgettable!"

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

Misc notes:

Created for Reddit event: Crestfall Town OC
creator: Sylphilya
